headline: 2 Nasdaq 100 Stocks on Our Watchlist and 1 We Question
summary: While the Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is filled with cutting-edge technology and consumer companies, not all are on solid footing. Some are dealing with declining demand, high costs, or regulatory pressures that could limit future upside.

headline: Top 50 High-Quality Dividend Growth Stocks For April 2026
summary: I track a universe of 50 high-quality dividend growth stocks to identify attractive entry points based on updated valuations and forward return estimates.

headline: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
summary: US equities continued their upward momentum over last week, with broad-based gains across major sectors led by tech, industrials, and small-caps. The energy sector was the notable exception.
